word: If it rains tomorrow, I will stay home.
If I won the lottery, I would travel the world.
If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
If I were rich, I would buy a big house.
If she calls me, I will answer.
If I had more time, I would learn to play guitar.
If we leave now, we will arrive on time.
If I were you, I would apologize.
If he works hard, he will get a promotion.
If she knew the answer, she would tell us.
If you don't hurry, you will miss the bus.
If I could fly, I would visit every country.
If it's sunny tomorrow, we will go to the beach.
If I had a million dollars, I would donate to charity.
If you eat too much, you will feel sick.
If they lived closer, we would see them more often.
If I finish my work early, I will go to the gym.
If he were taller, he could be a basketball player.
If you need help, I will be there for you.
If we had a car, we would drive to the mountains.
If she practices every day, she will improve quickly.
If I spoke Chinese, I would work in Beijing.
If they invite us, we will definitely go.
If I didn't have to work, I would sleep all day.
If you see John, will you tell him to call me?
If she were here, she would know what to do.
If we save money, we will buy a new car.
If I had superpowers, I would help people.
If you press this button, the machine will start.
If we lived in the future, everything would be different.
